# xui_inbounds (Data Source)

List inbounds from `/panel/api/inbounds/list`. Use `json` with `jsondecode()` in Terraform for structured access.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "xui_inbounds" "all" {}

data "xui_inbounds" "vless_only" {
  protocol = "vless"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `protocol` (String) If set, filter results to this protocol (e.g. `vless`).

### Read-Only

- `json` (String) JSON array of inbound objects after optional protocol filter.
